description_long: This is a modern, multi-story skyscraper with three distinct floors, each separated by wide, flat overhanging slabs that create a tiered appearance. The structure features a central vertical core, likely housing elevators or staircases, with open stairwells visible on the front side. The exterior is finished in a light, smooth material, possibly concrete or composite panels, and the building sits on a tiled, rectangular base that mimics an urban plaza or sidewalk. The uppermost floor is partially enclosed, while the lower levels are more open, suggesting a mix of indoor and outdoor spaces. The rear of the building is mostly solid, with a single vertical panel that may represent a service or emergency exit. There are no visible windows or decorative elements, giving the building a minimalist, functional look.
description: A minimalist, three-story skyscraper with wide overhanging floors, a central core, and open stairwells, set on a tiled urban base. The facade is smooth and light-colored, with a functional, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing open stairwells, railings, and the tiered structure of the three floors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the overhanging floors and the solid central core.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a mostly solid facade with minimal openings and a vertical panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back panel and the offset alignment of the floors.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is composed of smooth, light-colored panels with wide, flat overhangs separating each floor. Minimal ornamentation and exposed stairwells contribute to a clean, functional aesthetic.
